title: Too Many Binds Plus
body:
![Search menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rNkQ2ybI/images/f23669f713a1e24dfa3734c5363f2379f409d100.png)

1. Open the search menu (default key Enter)
2. Search for a keybind
3. Select keybind using arrow keys or Tab
4. Press enter again to simulate a keybind press

Useful for players with smaller keyboards, modpacks with a lot of keybinds, potentially dangerous keybinds, or rarely used keybinds.

This project is not associated with NebelNidas and dzwdz's [Too Many Binds](https://modrinth.com/mod/too-many-binds), however I've been given permission to use the name "Too Many Binds" for this mod.  
This project aims to target newer versions of Minecraft (1.20+), please use the aforementioned mod if you wish to use a similar mod for older versions.
